name: Amaretto Peach Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain and puree the peach halves.
2. Combine margarine and sugar until light and fluffy. Blend in egg. Add flour; mix well. Spread dough onto bottom of 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 450 degrees F., 10 minutes.
3. In a separate bowl, combine cream cheese, sugar, and flour; mixing at medium speed on an electric mixer until well blended. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Add peaches and liqueur; mix well. Pour over crust.
4. Reduce oven temperature to 250 degrees F.; continue baking 65 minutes. Loosen cake from rim of pan; cool before removing rim of pan. Chill. Garnish with additional peach slices and sliced almonds, if desired.
